results.title: Modi-Albanese Meeting to Focus on Strategic Ties
results.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will visit Melbourne for the Australia-India Annual Leaders' Summit from July 8–10, where he will hold bilateral talks with Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese to strengthen strategic and economic ties.

results.title: Another Setback For Mamata: TMC State President Chandrima Bhattacharya Resigns From All Party Posts | India News
results.description: Last Updated:July 04, 2026, 13:47 IST Chandrima Bhattacharya was appointed as TMC’s State President after the party’s election defeat against the BJP. Chandrima Bhattacharya was one of Mamata Banerjee’s closest...
